title: Update api/generate.js - Switch to Gemini primary with SiliconFlow fallback
description: Change imports to use geminiRetry from _gemini.js, keep siliconRetry from _siliconflow.js. Restructure gen loop: try gemini-3.1-flash-lite (3min timeout) → gemini-3-flash-preview → Qwen/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B via SiliconFlow. Use interactions.create with temperature=1.5.

title: Update scratch/apps_script.js - callGemini temperature param + generateHomework cascade
description: Add temperature param to callGemini function, pass to generationConfig. Restructure generateHomework to try callGemini with gemini-3.1-flash-lite first, then gemini-3-flash-preview, then fall back to callSiliconFlow with qwen3.6.
